overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character in a cyan shirt navigating a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character waits at a street corner, crosses a multi-lane road, and walks along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway with towering skyscrapers visible in the background.

events.description: character turns and begins walking toward the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing on sidewalk near crosswalk, observing traffic and surroundings before crossing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige shirt standing nearby, also waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with yellow neon strip lighting underneath
continuous yellow neon tubes running along the highway structure
white zebra stripes marking pedestrian crossing area
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark cyberpunk street corner beneath an elevated highway. The character stands on a concrete sidewalk next to a crosswalk, with massive yellow neon strip lights illuminating the right side. The futuristic city skyline glows in the hazy distance while the character waits, observing the moderate traffic flow before beginning to move toward the crosswalk.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the multi-lane street
black sedan passes by on the left as character reaches middle of intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, moving from the sidewalk toward the opposite side

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection, passing behind the crossing pedestrians

entered.detail: overhead metal structure spanning the road with traffic lights and signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection crosswalk, moving away from the elevated highway structure which recedes into the background. The space opens up with an overhead traffic gantry visible ahead. The character crosses with a moderate crowd of pedestrians while vehicles pass by on the left, navigating the asphalt crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: character steps onto opposite sidewalk and begins walking alongside the elevated highway
character briefly stops walking to look at handheld device or object

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing occasional pedestrians and maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: security officer in uniform walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall concrete wall supporting the elevated highway, covered with graffiti
modern street light with horizontal LED fixture illuminating the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto the opposite sidewalk, walking alongside a concrete retaining wall with continuous yellow neon strip lighting. The elevated highway structure now dominates the right side at close proximity, creating a semi-enclosed corridor. The character walks steadily past street lamps and digital billboards, with the futuristic skyline visible ahead, occasionally passing other pedestrians including a security officer while traffic continues to flow on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, open street corner across a busy intersection and into a semi-enclosed neon corridor. It begins with the character waiting on a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where massive yellow neon strips illuminate the edge of a hazy, glowing city skyline. As the character steps forward, the scene opens up into a wide intersection, moving away from the highway structure and through a crowd of pedestrians toward an overhead traffic gantry. The camera then follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, where the environment shifts as the elevated highway returns to dominate the right side in close proximity. Finally, the movement continues along a concrete retaining wall lined with continuous yellow neon, passing digital billboards and a security officer while the futuristic skyline remains visible ahead.
